compiled_state.title: As a practitioner, debug-everything validates project health after fixing known bugs and loops back for newly discovered issues
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: After bug-fix mode completes, add validation mode that runs the diagnostic scan, creates bug tickets for any new failures discovered, and loops back to bug-fix mode — up to a configurable maximum iteration count
**Why**: Fixing one bug can expose or create new failures. The validation loop catches these without requiring a separate session, while the iteration cap prevents unbounded execution.
**Scope**:
- IN: Validation mode flow after bug-fix mode; configurable max iterations via debug.max_fix_validate_cycles in dso-config.conf (default 3); ticket creation for new failures; loop-back to bug-fix mode; stop-and-report behavior when max iterations reached
- OUT: Modifying the diagnostic scan itself; changing triage sub-agent behavior

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, after bug-fix mode completes, debug-everything runs a diagnostic scan and creates bug tickets for newly discovered failures
  ← Satisfies: "When debug-everything is invoked with open bug tickets, it skips diagnostic/triage phases — no diagnostic or triage sub-agents dispatched when open bug tickets exist" (validation mode runs AFTER bug-fix, not instead of it)
- When this story is complete, the validation→bug-fix loop repeats up to the configured max (default 3), then reports remaining issues as open tickets and stops
  ← Satisfies: "The validation→bug-fix loop has a configurable max iteration count (default 3)"
- When this story is complete, the debug.max_fix_validate_cycles key is recognized in dso-config.conf with a default value of 3
  ← Satisfies: "configurable via debug.max_fix_validate_cycles in dso-config.conf"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← TDD Done-of-Done

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Diagnostic scan failure must count toward max iterations, not cause an infinite loop

comments.body: Consideration: [Integration] When the post-fix validation scan discovers new failures, new bug tickets are created. If the interactivity flag (Story 4) is set to non-interactive, these new bugs should be auto-fixed without user prompting up to max iterations. Ensure ticket creation and fix dispatch in the loop respects the interactivity flag, particularly for safeguard bugs discovered in re-validation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All tasks complete: e98c-da8c (RED tests) + 9caf-454f (config) + d48d-d2bd (validation loop) + cc5d-2b3b (config boundary tests).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
